title: UDP Blocks
description:
Adds many aesthetic and functional blocks to Minecraft. 
All textures in this mod are attributed to their respective creators! 
This mod is primarily made for a modded server I'm a part of, and for the fun of it. :)
Lots planned!
body:
# What is the UDP Blocks mod?
This mod introduces a handful of unique new blocks to Minecraft, perfect for building, decorating, and adding variety to your world. Each block is designed to blend naturally with the game’s style while providing you with more creative options for your builds.
Make sure to check out my other mods!~ :)
Anything you want to see in the mod? Just let me know, and I'll try to add it in. :|
By the way, UDP stands for UnDeadPotato :)
